bug.description: 第 8 周调到第 13 周时，一键推荐仍推荐第 13 周同课程同 day/slot/room (self-conflict)
bug.rootCause: checkScheduleConflicts 用 id:not:slotId 全局排除 source slot (不论周); K24-A plan helper 未做 targetWeek-aware 拦截; dryRunScheduleAdjustment 已正确处理但未被复用

fix.gateCheck: isTaskActiveInWeek(weekType, startWeek, endWeek, targetWeek) AND prisma.scheduleSlot.findFirst(teachingTaskId + dayOfWeek + slotIndex, NO scheduleSlotId exclusion)
fix.onHit: rejected.teacherConflict += 1; continue (skip all room candidates for this time)
fix.localHelperAdded: isTaskActiveInWeek (pure, no import, same semantics as week-filter.ts)

integrationTest.approach: real DB read-only: teachingTask spanning weeks 1..16, cross-week search to week 6
